task: Create a research report on quantum computing applications in cryptography. Include current state, applications, security implications, and trends.

agents.name: DataCollectorAgent
agents.instructions: Gather information about quantum computing and cryptography. Include recent papers, developments, and industry news. Stamp the report with the current UTC time.

agents.name: ResearchAnalystAgent
agents.instructions: Analyze the collected data, identify trends, evaluate sources, and synthesize findings.

agents.name: SecurityExpertAgent
agents.instructions: Assess security implications of quantum computing on cryptography. Identify vulnerabilities and mitigation strategies.

agents.name: ReportWriterAgent
agents.instructions: Create a structured report with executive summary, analysis, conclusions, and recommendations.

settings._note: TimePlugin demonstrates plugin tool usage; CodeInterpreter shows hosted-tool composition.
